task_completion.description: Fix the tombstone fallthrough bug in lsm.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file lsm.py is open in the editor, showing modifications to read/get logic to properly respect tombstone (deletion) markers and prevent returning stale data from older levels.

task_completion.description: Run the test suite and verify that all tests pass.

integrity.description: Verify the test results are from actual test execution.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the source code files genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and editing the actual Python files (sstable.py, compaction.py, lsm.py) in an editor, rather than just echoing pre-written blocks of code blindly from the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pylsm_engine. The three specific bugs to fix are: 1) binary search off-by-one in sstable.py, 2) merge priority inversion in compaction.py, and 3) tombstone fallthrough in lsm.py. Note: Although the task description claims there are 15 tests, the test suite actually contains exactly 8 tests. A successful run will show 8 tests passing.
